home.events_desc: Upcoming festivals, cultural experiences, and local happenings across Nepal.
home.tours_desc: Our most booked adventures across Nepal — handpicked for every type of traveller.
home.why_desc: We combine local knowledge, transparent planning, and thoughtful service so your Nepal trip feels exciting from the first click to the final day.
home.trust1_desc: Every tour is vetted for safety. Licensed guides, insured vehicles, and 24/7 support throughout your journey.
home.trust2_desc: We match any comparable offer. Get the best value for your Nepal adventure with no hidden fees.
home.trust3_desc: Our team of local experts crafts authentic experiences. We know Nepal like the back of our hand.
home.contact_desc: Share your dates, travel style, or group size and our local team will shape the perfect itinerary for you.
home.newsletter_desc: Subscribe for the latest tour packages, upcoming events, travel tips, and exclusive deals delivered to your inbox.
about.hero_desc: Born in the heart of the Himalayas — driven by a passion to connect every traveller with Nepal's most breathtaking peaks, trails, and people.
about.feature1_desc: Every trail is GPS-mapped and reviewed by experienced Sherpa guides with decades on the mountains.
about.feature2_desc: Hand-picked lodges along the route — warm meals, hot showers, and uninterrupted mountain views.
about.feature3_desc: Acclimatization schedules, oximeters on every trek, and emergency evacuation plans at high altitude.
about.feature4_desc: Dedicated photography-focused treks with golden-hour stops at the best Himalayan viewpoints.
about.values_heading: What Drives Us Up the Mountain
about.guides_desc: Every great adventure starts with an even greater guide. Our team brings decades of Himalayan experience to every trek.
about.team_desc: The people behind every booking, itinerary, and Himalayan story — leadership and staff working from our Thamel office.
about.cta_desc: Whether you're a first-time trekker or a seasoned mountaineer — your next Himalayan adventure starts here.
tours.hero_desc: From day trips to multi-week treks — find the perfect adventure for every traveler.

contact.cta_heading: Ready to Plan Your Nepal Journey?
contact.cta_desc: Share your dates, travel style, and ideas with us, and we'll help shape the right trip for you.
faq.q1_1: Where is Golden Era Travel and Tours based?
faq.a1_1: We are a legally registered travel company based in Kathmandu 16, Naya Bazar, Swayambhu Marg.
faq.q1_2: What types of tours do you offer?
faq.a1_2: We offer cultural tours, trekking, adventure trips, wellness tours, and customized travel packages across Nepal.
faq.q1_3: Are your guides experienced and licensed?
faq.a1_3: Yes, all our guides are government-licensed and have extensive experience in tourism.
faq.a1_4: Absolutely, we specialize in tailor-made trips based on your preferences and schedule.
faq.q1_5: Do you organize groups as well as private tours?
faq.a1_5: Yes, we offer both private and group tours depending on your requirement.
faq.q2_1: How can I book a tour with you?
faq.a2_1: You can book directly through our website, email, or by contacting our team via WhatsApp.
faq.q2_2: Do I need to pay a deposit to confirm my booking?
faq.a2_2: Yes, a deposit is required to secure your booking, with the balance payable before or upon arrival.
faq.q2_3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a2_3: We accept bank transfers, online payments, card payments and major international payment platforms.
faq.a2_4: Yes, we use secure payment systems to ensure your transactions are safe.
faq.q2_5: Will I receive a booking confirmation?
faq.a2_5: Yes, you will receive a confirmation email with all trip details once your booking is confirmed.
faq.q3_1: Do I need a visa to visit Nepal?
faq.a3_1: Most travelers can obtain a visa on arrival at Kathmandu Airport. Check immigration.gov.np for visa information.
faq.q3_2: What is the best time to visit Nepal?
faq.a3_2: Spring (March–May) and Autumn (September–November) offer the best weather for travel and trekking.
faq.q3_3: What should I pack for my trip?
faq.a3_3: Packing depends on your trip, but generally includes comfortable clothing, trekking gear, and personal essentials.
faq.q3_4: Do you provide airport pickup and drop-off?
faq.a3_4: Yes, we provide airport transfers for all our guests.
faq.a3_5: Yes, we strongly recommend travel insurance, especially for trekking and adventure activities.
faq.q4_1: Do I need prior trekking experience?
faq.a4_1: Not necessarily; we offer treks suitable for beginners to experienced trekkers.
faq.q4_2: How do you ensure safety during trips?
faq.a4_2: We follow strict safety protocols, provide experienced guides, and monitor conditions throughout the journey.
faq.q4_3: What happens in case of an emergency?
faq.a4_3: We arrange immediate assistance, including evacuation if necessary.
faq.a4_4: Yes, necessary permits are required and we handle all arrangements for you.
faq.a4_5: We can arrange rental or purchase of trekking gear upon request.
faq.q5_1: What type of accommodation is provided?
faq.a5_1: We offer a range from budget to luxury hotels and teahouses depending on your package.
faq.q5_2: Are meals included in the tour?
faq.a5_2: Meals depend on the package; trekking tours usually include full board meals.
faq.a5_3: Yes, we can arrange meals based on dietary requirements with prior notice.
faq.q6_1: Can I modify my booking after confirmation?
faq.a6_1: Yes, changes can be made depending on availability and conditions.
faq.a6_2: Cancellation terms vary by package; details will be provided at the time of booking.
faq.a6_3: We do not provide insurance directly but can recommend trusted providers.
faq.q6_4: Can you arrange domestic flights within Nepal?
faq.a6_4: Yes, we can arrange domestic flights as part of your itinerary.
faq.q6_5: Do you provide support during the trip?
faq.a6_5: Yes, our team is available 24/7 to assist you throughout your journey.
faq.a6_6: Yes, Nepal is generally safe and welcoming for tourists.
faq.q6_7: How can I contact you during my trip?
faq.a6_7: You can reach us anytime via phone, WhatsApp, or email.
